title: GameboyGUI
description: GUI pack with a desaturated color palette inspired by the original gameboy.
body:
![main_image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/U3el9Cmk/images/9be9a35e8db27d1078adedad65182400d0bc5d0c.jpeg)

# Gameboy GUI pack

### Features
- Overhauls all GUI/menus
- Survival HUD and inventory
- All block interfaces
- Creative inventory
- Advancements menu
- Mod menu and Sodium support

Check the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gameboyui/gallery) for screenshots.

[![discord_link](https://i.ibb.co/2KsR4xm/discord-banner.png)](https://discord.gg/MzA2zgPgD8)
